item.title: on respecting wood
item.description: Trying to type a quick unedited thought everyday/ Wood is an inherently impresice medium, it expands and contracts based on humidity and temperature. Depending on the sawing from the lumber yard wood can bow, crook, kink, cup, and dance. Additionally the strength of wood is heavily dependent on grain direction. I was walking today when I saw a nutcracker. The nutcracker had his head attached with dowel pins. The grain direction on the head above the jawline was forty five degrees off from the vertical axis and glued down sloppily.

item.title: Hello World!
item.description: Changed from wordpress to static site using the hugo static site generator. probably going to be infrequently updated or abandoned. additionally vim is not the best for writing blogs. The reason why I decided against wordpress was the overhead of hostsing. I can serve thousands of page views on a static site no problem but if I try to serve more than 10 at a time on my old macbook server it would bog down (not that anyone would read this blog).
